title: Pocket raises $11M in bet on rising demand for AI note-taking devices
summary: Pocket has raised $11 million in funding for its AI-powered note-taking device, a $129 credit card-shaped puck that attaches to smartphones. The device offers unlimited recordings, transcriptions, and to-do item management, positioning itself in the growing market for AI-enabled productivity hardware.
content: Pocket sells a $129, credit card-shaped puck, which sticks to the back of your phone, and promises unlimited recordings, transcriptions and to-do items.

zh.title: Pocket获得1100万美元融资,看好AI笔记设备市场需求
zh.summary: Pocket为其AI驱动的笔记设备获得1100万美元融资,这款设备形似信用卡,售价129美元,可附加到智能手机上。该设备提供无限录音、转录和待办事项管理功能,在不断增长的AI生产力硬件市场中占据一席之地。

title: Flipper Device’s new Busy Bar is a customizable display for productivity
summary: Flipper Devices has launched the Busy Bar, a customizable productivity display designed to reduce workplace distractions and improve focus. The device will retail for $249.
content: Flipper Device's new Busy Bar will retail for $249.

zh.title: Flipper设备推出新款Busy Bar,可定制生产力显示屏
zh.summary: Flipper Devices推出了Busy Bar,这是一款可定制的生产力显示屏,旨在减少工作场所干扰并提高专注力。该设备的零售价为249美元。

title: Omen AI’s plan to optimize data centers is all wet
summary: Omen AI secured $31 million in Series A funding to develop technology for monitoring data center chip coolant systems and preventing bacterial contamination. The startup aims to optimize data center operations and reduce infrastructure failures.
content: Omen AI raised a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant and stop bacterial outbreaks in data centers.

zh.title: Omen AI的数据中心优化计划前景可观
zh.summary: Omen AI获得3100万美元A轮融资,开发用于监控数据中心芯片冷却液系统和防止细菌污染的技术。该初创公司旨在优化数据中心运营并减少基础设施故障。

title: The Flipper Zero creators’ Busy Bar productivity display will go on sale next month
summary: The Busy Bar from Flipper Zero creators will launch on July 14th with three pricing tiers: $179 for waitlist customers, $199 for the first 3,000 units, and $249 regular retail. The pixelated LED display device is designed to signal focus time and reduce workplace distractions.
content:
The Busy Bar makes it obvious to others when you don’t want to be distracted. | Image: Flipper Devices	

First announced over a year ago in April 2025, the Busy Bar will be available for purchase starting on July 14th when the device also starts shipping. Created by the same team behind the Flipper Zero wireless multitool, the Busy Bar is instead described as a "productivity multitool" that relies on a pixelated LED display to help reduce distractions and improve focus. The first 3,000 units purchased on July 14th will be discounted to $199, but the Busy Bar will normally retail for $249. Those who previously joined the Busy Bar waitlist will still be able to purchase one next month for $179.
The Busy Bar looks a lot like an alarm clock, but i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Flipper Zero 创建者的 Busy Bar 生产力显示屏将于下月上市
zh.summary: Flipper Zero 创建者推出的 Busy Bar 将于 7 月 14 日发布，分为三个价格等级：等候名单客户为 179 美元，前 3,000 个单位为 199 美元，常规零售价为 249 美元。这款像素化 LED 显示设备旨在表示专注时间并减少工作场所的干扰。

title: How to end a TV show
summary: Mystery-packed television series often struggle to deliver satisfying conclusions after building complex narratives, as exemplified by shows like Lost and the MGM Plus series From. The challenge of resolving multiple plot threads while meeting viewer expectations remains a significant hurdle for showrunners.
content:
Ending any story is hard, but that's especially true of mystery-packed TV shows. Series like Lost initially hook viewers with constantly building secrets and questions, to the point that they can often seem incomprehensible. But the promise is that it will all pay off in the end - a feat that few shows ultimately manage. This creates tension as viewers try to put all of the pieces together while hoping that the show's creators know what they're doing in the long run. The latest example is From on MGM Plus, a Lost-style horror series that just wrapped up its penultimate season, with a fifth and final one coming in 2027. Naturally, endings are …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 如何结束一部电视剧
zh.summary: 充满神秘的电视连续剧在构建复杂叙事后往往难以提供令人满意的结局，如《Lost》和 MGM Plus 剧集《From》所示。在解决多条情节线索同时满足观众期望方面存在的挑战仍然是编剧面临的重大障碍。

title: Comcast is splitting in two
summary: Comcast announced plans to split into two publicly traded companies, separating its profitable broadband and wireless business from its media assets including NBCUniversal and Sky. The separation is expected to be completed within approximately one year, with shareholders receiving shares in both resulting companies.
content:
Comcast has announced plans to separate itself into two publicly traded companies, spinning off its NBCUniversal and Sky broadcasting arms. The shake up aims to protect the media conglomerate's profitable broadband and wireless brand, which will retain the "Comcast" company name, as its media and entertainment business - now collectively named "NBCUniversal" - faces increasing pressure from industry consolidation and streaming rivals.
The separation is expected to take approximately a year, with Comcast shareholders owning shares in both Comcast and NBCUniversal upon completion. While current Comcast CEO Brian L. Roberts will be "actively i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 康卡斯特正在分裂成两家公司
zh.summary: 康卡斯特宣布计划分裂成两家上市公司，将其盈利的宽带和无线业务与包括 NBCUniversal 和 Sky 在内的媒体资产分开。预计分离将在大约一年内完成，股东将获得两家公司的股票。

title: The war against ‘woke’ could end US science as we know it
summary: A new federal policy proposal containing language attacking "woke" policies poses a potential threat to scientific research and the careers of thousands of U.S. scientists. The policy changes could have far-reaching implications for the scientific community and national research competitiveness.
content:
A sneaky rule change has the potential to blow up scientific research in the United States. But there's still time to fight it.
On May 29th, the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) issued a 412-page proposal to revise federal financial assistance. The language is a combination of distinctly Trumpian attacks on "woke" policies and boring governmentese designed to make your eyes glaze over as quickly as possible. But under phrases like "providing further clarification on the regulatory status of the OMB requirements" is something darker - a threat to scientific research in this country, the livelihoods of thousands of scientists, and the li …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 反"觉醒"政策之争可能改写美国科学格局
zh.summary: 一项新的联邦政策提案中包含攻击"觉醒"政策的表述，对科学研究和数千名美国科学家的职业生涯构成潜在威胁。这些政策变化可能对科学界和国家研究竞争力产生深远影响。

title: NASA's X-59 "frankenjet" tests supersonic flight without the sonic boom
summary: NASA's X-59 experimental aircraft has successfully demonstrated supersonic flight capabilities while eliminating the traditional sonic boom through advanced aerodynamic design. The breakthrough technology could enable future supersonic flights over populated areas without environmental disruption.
content: NASA’s quiet supersonic flight tests could eventually go on a national tour.

zh.title: NASA X-59"科学怪人飞机"成功进行无音爆超音速飞行测试
zh.summary: NASA X-59实验飞机通过先进的气动设计成功演示了超音速飞行能力，同时消除了传统音爆。这一突破性技术未来可能使超音速飞行在人口密集地区进行而不会造成环境干扰。
